Current Impact · Emboss Burgers

How I Grew a Restaurant Group's Revenue by 314% in 6 Months.

When I joined Emboss Burgers there was no data infrastructure, no delivery platform strategy, and no visibility into hourly profitability. I built the entire intelligence system from scratch — and the revenue followed.

SAR 208K → SAR 862K

01
AI-Powered · Power BI · Daily Report

Hourly Operations Report — Est. Contribution Profit Per Hour

Every day I generate a 12-page live operations report for all 3 branches. It breaks down every trading hour with real profitability — after stripping away every cost layer automatically.

  • Hour-by-hour Sales, Food Cost %, Labour & Prime Cost % per branch
  • Platform commissions removed per delivery channel per hour
  • Card fee (0.80%) removed from Dine-in & Takeaway transactions
  • Food cost + Labour + Rent + Marketing deducted → Est. Contribution Profit
  • Demand bands: Lean → Build-Up → Peak → Critical Peak
Session Result · 24–25 Jun 2026
SAR 22,789 across 3 branches · 451 orders · Est. Contribution Profit: SAR 3,862 after all deductions
Executive Snapshot + Contribution Profit
Order Type Mix & Top Products
Menu Engineering Dashboard — Power BI · Full View
02
Boston Matrix · Product Strategy · Weekly

Menu Engineering & Product Intelligence

Every product classified as Star, Puzzle, Ploworse, or Dog — based on Contribution Margin and Sales Mix. This analysis directly drove delivery revenue from SAR 59K to SAR 500K in 5 months.

  • Selling Price, Variable Cost/Unit, CM/Unit, CM% per product
  • Sales Mix % and Total CM — Stars promoted, Dogs removed
  • Classic Beef: 73,868 units · Crispy Chicken: 34,803 units (Stars)
  • Box 4 Combo: SAR 542K · Box 6 Combo: SAR 413K (engineered bundles)
Business Impact
Delivery sales: SAR 59K (Dec 2025) → SAR 500K (Jun 2026) · 747% in 5 months
03
HungerStation · Keeta · Ninja · Jahez

Delivery Platform P&L — True Profitability by Platform & Branch

I built a financial model that strips every cost layer from delivery revenue — exposing what the business actually keeps, branch by branch, platform by platform.

  • Gross Sales (incl. VAT) per platform per branch
  • Restaurant-funded offers separated and deducted
  • Platform commission removed → Net Amount Received
  • Food cost (from control dashboard, not just invoices) deducted
  • Final: Profit after Food Cost · per platform · per branch
April 2026 · All Platforms · All Branches
Gross SAR 309,874 → Net after commissions SAR 188,389 → Profit after food cost: SAR 114,432
Delivery P&L Report — April 2026
KPI Report — Cover & Overview
Delivery Platforms — All 4 Platforms
04
Monthly Intelligence · All Channels · All Branches

Monthly KPI Comparison Report — 12 Pages, Verified to the Last SAR

Same-period 21-day comparison across every channel and branch — reconciled against the live POS FactInvoice database. One verified source of truth for management.

  • June 2026: SAR 562,038 revenue · 10,700 orders · AOV SAR 52.53 ▲4.5%
  • Delivery ▲27.1% · HungerStation ▲31.9% · Ninja ▲43.7% strongest
  • Channel shift identified: delivery compensating for dine-in/takeaway decline
  • Grand total reconciled against POS database — zero discrepancy tolerance
Strategic Finding
Correctly identified structural channel shift — delivery +27.1% fully offset in-restaurant decline, driving overall growth of +8.5%.
05
Live Power BI · Staff Gamification System

Sales Dashboard & Daily Branch Challenge

I designed a daily inter-branch competition system that turns data into staff behaviour — tracking Combo Rate, Add-on Rate, and Drink Rate every session, with points, standings, and personalised coaching notes per branch manager.

  • Live Power BI: SAR by product, day, hour with branch/channel slicers
  • June 2026: Masif leads 173 pts after 24 sessions (19 session wins)
  • Daily champion declared · monthly cumulative standings tracked
  • Personalised next-session targets sent to each branch manager
  • Rate beats volume — efficiency rewarded over raw numbers
System Design Principle
54-customer branch can outscore 188-customer branch if Combo/Add-on/Drink rates are higher — drives behaviour not just volume.
Sales Dashboard — June 2026
Daily Branch Challenge — 24 Jun 2026
Olaya Branch Report — May 2026 · Highest Growth Branch
06
Monthly Narrative · Branch Intelligence

Branch Performance Reports — Olaya, Masif & Muruj

Each branch receives a monthly intelligence report — a data narrative explaining not just what happened, but why, and what to focus on next month. Reports connect KPIs to real operational decisions.

  • Olaya May: SAR 344.9K · +42.7% vs April · Highest growth in group
  • Channel mix evolution tracked: Takeaway 73% (Feb) → Delivery 52% (May)
  • Top 5 products by SAR + units · food cost trend · AOV movement
  • 3 specific focus areas defined for next month with measurable targets
Key Insight Identified
Delivery overtook Takeaway at Olaya for the first time in May 2026 — flagged as structural shift, not a one-time event.
Day-to-Day Intelligence Work

What I Build, Every Single Day

Beyond the major projects, this is the operational intelligence layer I maintain daily — the systems that keep the business running with clear eyes.

📊
Branch Performance Reports
Monthly narrative reports per branch — growth story, channel mix evolution, top product analysis, food cost trends, and specific focus areas for the next month.
🏆
Staff Challenge & Gamification
Daily inter-branch competition tracking Combo, Add-on and Drink rates. Points system, daily champion, monthly standings. After 24 sessions Masif leads with 173 pts.
⚙️
ERP Evaluation & POS Integration
Evaluating ERP systems to align accounting, inventory, and operations with Power BI. Coordinating API data flows and payment gateway reconciliation.
🔍
Food Cost Auditing by Channel
Weekly audits of food cost by order type — delivery, dine-in, takeaway, employee & owner meals — per branch. Flags raised on any hour exceeding 60% food cost.
📍
Platform & Google Business Management
Managing Google Business Profiles across all 3 branches. Optimising delivery listings on HungerStation, Keeta, Ninja, and Jahez aligned with menu engineering strategy.
💡
Offer Strategy & Rebranding
Designed offer timetable for dining and takeaway promotions. Contributed to rebranding and structured combo bundles (Box 4: SAR 542K, Box 6: SAR 413K in sales).
Projects

Selected Analytical Projects

Dashboards and tools built across tourism, education, and AI — the same data-first thinking applied across industries.

Tourism Analysis Dashboard

Interactive analytics dashboard visualising KPIs including tourist arrivals, hotel occupancy, and revenue trends. SQL-integrated for real-time reporting with advanced Power BI visuals for tourism boards.

Power BISQLExcel
College Academic & Placement Dashboard

Combined academic and placement data with BRD-designed filters. Mapped placement trends by CGPA across Wipro, TCS and others — enabling targeted student intervention.

Power BIPythonPandasJupyter
School Performance & Failure Insights

Analyzed 18,000+ students' data to identify failure rates by subject, gender, and board type. Drill-down dashboards exposed curriculum hotspots and performed Root Cause Analysis.

Power BIPythonExcelRCA
LLM-Based Resume Optimizer

GPT-powered tool to align resumes with job descriptions and improve ATS relevance. Built keyword extraction logic and side-by-side prompt-based analysis for early-career professionals.

GPTPrompt EngineeringPythonExcel
